use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and UI flows
Destructive action confirmation buttons with visual warning
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbars and action bars
Ghost and outline buttons for less prominent actions in conversation UIs
ai_summary: A reusable atomic button component built with Radix UI's Slot and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) with built-in accessibility features like focus-visible ring states and disabled state handling. Intended as a foundational UI building block for interactive elements in SaaS and developer tool interfaces.
